_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Design countermeasures and mitigations against potential exploitations of programming language weaknesses and vulnerabilities in system and elements.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of large language model capabilities, limitations, failure modes, and the prompt engineering and system design patterns that shape reliable LLM-based application behavior.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-001 (SP, cosine: 0.461), AI-T-006 (AI, cosine: 0.427).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.403). Shared vocabulary: [design, language, system]. DCWF-only terms [against, countermeasures, elements, exploitations, mitigations, potential] vs WIDAI-only terms [application, based, behavior, capabilities, engineering, failure] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.852 (P=0.852, R=0.852). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.6%). "Design countermeasures and mitigations against potential exploitations of progra" and "Knowledge of large language model capabilities, limitations, failure modes, and" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.483 > STS 0.403 (gap +0.080). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [design, language, system] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.2%. Shared tokens: [design, language, system]. DCWF-only: [against, countermeasures, elements, exploitations, mitigations, potential]. WIDAI-only: [application, based, behavior, capabilities, engineering, failure].
